mechanics.excerpt: Mercenaries Soldiers-for-hire have existed nearly long as warfare itself, and never has the ground been more fertile for the enter prising mercenary unit: Everyone but the Clans is actively hiring mercs these days_ most often in anticipation conflict , but sometimes t0 use In missions where deniability must be main- tained.
